entry.title: Re: Validation on GO Button in List Report

entry.title: Re: Validation on GO Button in List Report
entry.content: I think pagination is there by default. how come you say it is loading 12lakh data?

entry.title: Re: Validation on GO Button in List Report
entry.content:
Run with selection field Input - working fine

Run without selection field Input - throwing exceptions

So, to restrict this need GO button validation - Please suggest me any solution for GO button validation

entry.title: debug doesn't work
entry.content:
hi

 i am working in sap by design solution 

i finish devekope my sulution 

i moove it to the prod tenant 

now i have to do some changes in the solution 

so i created patch then i get a new solution in the test tenant in a ststus "in development "

 

now i want to debus this solution 

i set breakpoints 

and start debug mode 

i dont see any problem or alert 

but actually the code running not stop in the breakpoint that i set 

what can be the problem ?

i can add one more detailes 

the last action that i did in the first basic solution 

was to create a .bac file

 Could it be related to this?

what can i do now 

i must have the option to debug this solution

entry.title: Preceding Whitespace is trimmed when an IDoc is sent from SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
hi all,

We are sending an IDOC from SAP Integration suite to SAP ECC systems, but noticed preceding whitespace is being trimmed in a field when it reaches SAP ECC. The logic in mapping is such that if we have more than 70 characters in file name , then a new segment gets created with remaining characters of filename. And when the 71st character is a whitespace this is being trimmed at SAP ECC.

When we switch on trace or simulate it in Integration Suite the space is visible , but is missing when we check the same in SAP ECC systems.

We tried the same example via SAP PO and noticed the space appearing in SAP ECC.

Filename Example - Batch HF_ID225test_2024xxxxxxxxxx_xxxxx_x_xxx 2024 036_xxx_an_xxxxxxxx Seeds_20240912.pdf

Could someone suggest if this is standard behavior of SAP Integration Suite or if there is any standard solution to achieve expected outcome in SPA ECC  

SAP IS simulation

SAP ECC

Regards,

Smitha

entry.title: Re: How do you reverse engineer a JSON or API end-point t...
entry.content: Hi, we need to get API documentation from the API provider. I don't see any other way. Tools like swagger can be used to check the documentation if at all API provider enabled them.

Kedalene Chong

Thanks

 

When migrating legacy PO to S4Hana in the P2P cycle, what are the certain steps that need to be followed?

entry.title: CDS Hierarchy for query browser not allowed
entry.content:
Hi Experts, I am trying to have the tree layout in Query Browser' app where the hierarchy logic should be based on Work Breakdown Structures (WBS).

The issue that I am having is: in CDS, when I am setting @AnalyticsDetails.query.displayHierarchy:ON the I got following error: 'Annotations of & use hierarchies, but & does not have any [Analytics]'

For the same set up on another key column, this hierarchy set up works.

Is there a specific annotation that I have missed or we have some special rules about only specific key column are allowed to have 'displayHierarchy' set as 'ON'

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2024 Contest
entry.content:
Hello @thomas_jung 

Thank you for replaying. I added ID in the wrong place because of this sentence "Then just add this integer to the end of the following URL: https://devrel-tools-prod-scn-badges-srv.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/devtoberfestContest/scnId.Her...." I add id to the end of the link like "/scnId.Her1440128" .

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: Create multiple database users in Datasphere spaces
entry.content:
Hello,

don't know if the CLI is working for Database Users, but that's the only possible way to create mass users by file. I would at least try it before creating 350 by hand 😉 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/d0ecd6f297ac40249072a44df0549c1a/72dc33a8f41944f78318138bc1a57307.html?locale=en-US

Maybe you also create one by hand for a Space and then try read all the users from the Space, and hopefully you have a blueprint what params you have to Input for your Database User.

But the longer I read the docu for managing Users with CLI the more I think this is only meant for "real" Users and not DB-Users, but you can try it !

Regards
Julian

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Petoberfest 2024
How to find average based on entries of transactional data?
entry.content:
Hi,

Here is the scenario. I want to write a data action logic which calculates the average sales based on no of products present in the transactional data. For example, product quantity is present for three products in the transactional data. To calculate average sales, the formula is Total sales / (no. of products present in transactional data). Please refer below screenshot.

I'm unable to find unique records for products in the data action logic. Currently, there are three products and this product count is not fixed, it can four or five anytime. A data action action logic which can dynamically work in all scenarios irrespective of product quantity changing over period of time. 

Anyone who has faced such type of issue or knows the workaround in this scenario. Their comments would be deeply appreciated.

Thanks

entry.title: SAP BTP Trial API management configuration
entry.content:
Hi,

I am getting the following error when tried configuring API management capability of Integration suite. Any advice on how to configure this?

entry.title: Settlement management based on threshold value
entry.content:
Hi,

In settlement management when final settlement happens Business user wanted the settlement document to be created only when the threshold limit is met that is only when the sales volume has reached say 10000 USD, then only the accrual amount can be settled, if the sales volume hasn't reached then settlement should not happen.how this can be achieved?

entry.title: The OnPremise proxy type only supports http schema for 'URL' and 'tokenServiceURL' properties.
entry.content: sap btp destination for on-premise system. The OnPremise proxy type only supports http schema for 'URL' and 'tokenServiceURL' properties.

entry.title: Re: Asset Aquisition posting to WBS in S4 HANA Public cloud
entry.content: Inventory is also BS account, however it gets reflected in WBS reports; During PCE/On Prem days, we used to post a statistical entry Value Type 11 to the WBS.

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/cp-mobile-dev-kit-i18n-localization.html#3f92ec9d-92c1-461e-bb36-c6d0da442c32
The issue is resolved now.

entry.title: Re: Extension Project in Business Application Studio ?
entry.content: Hi Arushi, the wizard to create an adaptation project will automatically create an extension project in case it detects that the original app does not support an adaptation project.

entry.title: Re: QM inspection type 01 active but user wants to post t...
entry.content:
Greetings,

you can define that material is not posted to QI stock by de-selecting the indicator per material-inspection type combination.

Best regards, Matjaž.

entry.title: Re: SAP Screen Personas Camera IPad Auto focus
entry.content: Hi Tamas, thanks for the answer. Pierre.

entry.title: Runtime for crystal reports 14.2.x on the server
entry.content:
We had reports running with crystal reports 8.5. I had to upgrade the reports to 14.2.x with CR 2016 to accommodate the recent change requirements. The exports RPT files are then called and executed by a VB.Net project.

I couldn't test locally due to some restrictions. I deployed to the dev server. And I see errors stating "Invalid TLV record". It looks like I do not have the right runtime.

I searched through the official site but I could not find. I think I miss something here. And I am new to crystal reports. Please help.

 

SAP Crystal Reports

entry.title: Re: WCM Control Key
entry.content:
Greetiings,

by assigning WCM control key to an operation nothing actually gets created. You just get an option to assign WCA or WA to your maintenance order.

For this to work you need some basic customizing:

  • SPRO -> Plant Maintenance and Customer Service -> Work Clearance Management -> Master Data -> Maintain Application Profile
  • SPRO -> Plant Maintenance and Customer Service -> Work Clearance Management -> Master Data -> Architecture -> Assistant for Model Selection

Best regards, Matjaž.

entry.title: 𝐒𝐀𝐏 𝐈𝐧𝐬𝐢𝐝𝐞 𝐓𝐫𝐚𝐜𝐤 𝐆𝐮𝐫𝐮𝐠𝐫𝐚𝐦 2024: A Remarkable Experience
entry.content:
The morning of SAP Inside Track, Gurugram

As one of the core team members of the much-anticipated SAP Inside Track, Gurugram 2024 event, I woke up to the sound of rainfall still pattering against my balcony. The city was already drenched with heavy rainfall the previous day, and the forecast wasn’t looking any better for today either. My heart raced with a mix of anxiety and excitement. Would the weather dampen the spirits of our attendees? Would all our meticulous planning go in vain? Despite these worries, I knew the SIT event would be a success. As I arrived at the venue, I met the volunteers along with my fellow core team members Vipul Khullar, Vartika Gupta, Anuradha Dhingan, Meghna Patel and Neeraj Manocha. The energy among us was palpable, and as the first guests started to trickle in, we felt a surge of optimism. And there we knew it was going to be a day to remember!

 

 

Kick-off         

The event kicked off with an inspiring welcome note by Aseem Khera, Location Head at SAP Labs India, Gurugram. He underscored the pivotal role of the SAP community in driving innovation and fostering collaboration, emphasizing how events like these create invaluable synergies. Aseem also highlighted SAP’s strategic focus on leveraging artificial intelligence to deliver enhanced value to its customers.

 

This was followed by an inspiring video keynote delivered by Sindhu Gangadharan, Managing Director of SAP Labs India, Head of Customer Innovation Services, and Chairperson of NASSCOM. She emphasized the significance of learning and networking through community events such as SAP Inside Track. Sindhu discussed the substantial impact of artificial intelligence on the global economy and highlighted SAP's pivotal role in assisting businesses to harness the extensive economic advantages of it. Furthermore, she encouraged community members to aspire to become SAP Champions and SAP Mentors.

 

This was succeeded by a keynote presentation titled “Identifying Value-Based Business AI Scenarios with a Human-Centric Approach,” delivered by Kamalika Bhar of our sponsor Mindset Consulting and Divya Chandrika Mohan from SAP.

 

The morning track was successfully concluded with a presentation on SAP Business AI by Sudhir Verma, the Head of Cross Technology & Architecture for Private Cloud Products at SAP. During this session, Sudhir offered valuable insights into the transformative potential of Generative AI, highlighting key innovations such as Joule and the GenAI Hub. Additionally, Neha Anand from SAP showcased various productive use cases utilizing Joule, further enriching the discussion.

 

I would like to express my heartfelt gratitude to our host, Vartika Gupta, for expertly keeping the energy and momentum alive!

 

Following, track 1, several sessions were conducted throughout the day, concentrating on SAP Generative AI, SAP Business AI, and a variety of practical use cases across Tracks 2 to 4. Presenters from SAP Labs India, Mindset, IBM, and EY provided valuable insights into how Generative AI within SAP applications is enhancing value for both businesses and customers.

 

Engaging Sessions: Learning and Networking

Track 2

  1. Unleashing the power of Retrieval Augmented Generation with SAP AI Core Generative AI Hub and SAP HANA Cloud Vector Engine

     Speaker: Deep Srivastava

 

 

2. SAP Gen AI solutions that won hearts in SAP Hack2Build 2024

   Speaker: Aayush Dhawan

 

3. SAP AI Business Services - Al models, pre-trained on business relevant data

Speaker: Anuradha Dhingan

 

 4. Building an Application with SAP Build Code and Joule

Speaker: Ravi Grover

 

5. SAP Business AI for A Better Gurugram

Speaker: Niladri Bihari Nayak & Haritosh Srivastav

 

Track 3

1. Umbrella of SAP BTP AI

Speaker:  Chandra Bhushan Singh & Mayank Singhal

 

2. Building a Data fabric and Unlocking Business Value with AI in SAP Datasphere

Speaker: Akhil Das & Pratik Doshi

 

3. From Insights to Experience with Business AI in SAP Digital Supply Chain

Speaker: Raunak Agarwal & Shreyance Parakh

 

4. CX AI Toolkit

Speaker: Aditi Dahal, Nikkita & Siddharth Agarwal

 

5. Empower Your Business with Intelligent Situation Handling and Joule

Speaker: Ranjeet Kumar

 

6. SAP Business AI - Innovations in Procurement & Supply Chain

Speaker: Rakesh Pupneja

 

Track 4 was dedicated to Hands on experience activities:

Participants had the opportunity to explore SAP's newest AI features and capabilities through hands-on experience. During the interactive sessions, participants created close to 50 SAP-based applications, showcasing how AI can be practically applied in various business scenarios.

 

Sponsors

Thanks to our esteemed sponsors Deloitte and Mindset and for their contribution in making SAP Inside Track Gurugram 2024 - Business AI Edition a memorable event. 

A Day to Remember: Summary and Reflections

In conclusion, the SAP Inside Track (SIT) was not merely an event; it represented a convergence of shared knowledge, networking opportunities, and collaborative learning within the SAP Community. Over 100 plus community members participated, providing valuable constructive feedback on the overall experience.

 

Throughout the day, I had the privilege of meeting remarkable individuals, and I eagerly anticipate the upcoming SAP Inside Tracks in Gurugram to reconnect with them. The energy and enthusiasm were palpable, a testament to the collective passion driving us forward. I would like to express my heartfelt gratitude to all the fellow organizers, volunteers, speakers, and our sponsors, as their contributions were instrumental in the event's success. Thank you once again for your exceptional efforts and commitment. I look forward to collaborating with you all on future endeavours.

entry.title: Re: Adapting Launchpad App Descriptor Items via adaptation mode in Launchpad App Manager
entry.content: Interesting and informative.

entry.title: Re: Subscription Billing Forecast line items
entry.content:
Hello Ashwin,

Please try using the below FM. please put break point and in FP_VT3 ,try with simulate option.  FKKBIX_BIP_PARAMS-SIMURUN

FKK_BIX_BIP_REQUEST_SINGLE
FKK_BIX_BIP_REQUEST_SINGLE0

Hope it helps.

Thank you 

Jagannath Parija

entry.title: Build Process automation Recorder issue
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

Good Day!

I am facing one issue with recorder, After launching the recorder for screen captures it was redirecting to popup and once after clicking on record button it was not giving anything.

Up to 1-2 minutes it will be blank by disabling the recorder, then again it was enabling the record button and giving same after clicking record button again.

I am not able to use the recorder, attaching the screenshot.

Any advices or suggestions would be helpful.

 

Best Regards:

Ambica C

The screenshots I have shows that I am assigned to the operation. However, I am unsure if I was assigned/responsible for the whole order.

entry.title: Re: Consolidation unit can't be deleted because of invali...
entry.content: No it is not part of any selection. I also did the filter of consolidation unit field in the "Define selection" app but couldn't find any selection.

entry.title: Devtoberfest 2024 - Tooling (SAP Build) Sessions
entry.content:
Today is the first day of Devoberfest!!

Make sure you partake of the:

  • Contest -- grand prize is a trip to an SAP TechEd event with a lot of extras; and even though it's several years' old I still love the gameboard
  • Petoberfest – post a picture of your pet 🐢
  • Sessions – find all the sessions in the event calendar 
  • 👉 The annual SAP Crossword Puzzle – if you have the skill, you can earn 1800 points!

Devtoberfest 2024 sessions

Here's a quick rundown of the SAP Build "Tooling Tuesday" sessions, which touch on the following topics:

  • SAP Build Apps
  • SAP Build Process Automation
  • SAP Build Work Zone
  • SAP Build Code
  • MDK
  • S/4HANA + extensions
  • Integration Suite, including event mesh
  • CAP
  • AI Core
  • GenAI + Joule
  • SAP Cloud Transport Management

That's just one day of Devtoberfest!! In each session, you'll have a chance to ask questions directly to the presenter, who will answer them live or in the chat.

September 24

  • 🟣 Transform Data with Scripting in SAP Build Process Automation

  • 🟣 Develop a Full-Stack CAP Application with SAP Build Code

  • 🟣 Develop with SAP Build Apps Like a Pro

  • 🟣 Real-World S/4HANA Invoice Approval Process with SAP Build Process Automation

October 1

  • 🟣 SAP Build Apps 2049: Soon with UI5 and GenAI?

  • 🟣 Enable Work Zone to Consume Business Solutions from Other BTP Subaccounts (content federation)

  • 🟣 Cross-Platform Mobile App Development with SAP Build Code and the MDK

  • 🟣 Putting It All Together: S/4HANA Retail Pricing App Using SAP Build, AI, Event Mesh and More

October 15

  • 🟣 S/4HANA Extensions: Start Fast with the New Extensibility Wizard

  • 🟣 Guided Experiences with SAP Build Process Automation and Work Zone

  • 🟣 Develop Even Faster (!) with SAP Build Apps Templates

  • 🟣 Boost Development with GenAI in SAP Build Process Automation

October 22

  • 🟣 Chatbot Development Made Easy with SAP AI Core and Build Apps

  • 🟣 Set Up Rules for Who Can Create and Transport SAP Build Projects

  • 🟣 Leveraging Decisions and Business Rules in SAP Build Process Automation

  • 🟣 Extend Joule with Your Own Skills

Learn a lot about SAP development tools, have a lot of fun – and maybe we'll see you at an SAP TechEd event next year 😸

entry.title: Re: SAP Community Call for ALM – APJ edition
entry.content:
Hi,

How to register for

SAP Business Transformation Center Date / Time: September 24, 2024 10am IST / 12:30pm SGT

entry.title: Disabling of learning native login
entry.content:
Hi,

I found this information regarding the disabling of learning native login:

IMPORTANT: A user with an SAP SuccessFactors Platform account will not be able to login via Learning native login effective November 15, 2024. The SuccessFactors Platform login must be used to access SuccessFactors Learning if the user has an SAP SuccessFactors Platform account.

Learning users with an SAP SuccessFactors Platform user account who login via a Learning native login page are considered incorrectly setup. This setup is not supported, instead access to Learning can be offered to users that are not employees by one of two external user options.

Please take action to ensure your implementation aligns with one of the supported alternatives:

1. SAP SuccessFactors Learning customers can create these users as internal users in SAP SuccessFactors Platform and use Platform authentication.
- This alternative is recommended for users with a worker relationship, such as contingent workers.
- These internal users will be provided access to SAP SuccessFactors Platform, mobile and other integrated solutions
2. SAP SuccessFactors Learning customers can create Learning only users which is separate from SAP SuccessFactors Platform.
- This is recommended for non-workers such as customers, distributors, or partners.
- The Learning only solution for external users does not currently support mobile or other integrated solutions.

Option 2 would be the only choice in my case. What is required to go for option 2 above?

//Monica

entry.title: Re: How can I check the debt amount after the fee is deducted in a list in automatic payment managem
entry.content: From Table Field REGUH-PAYGR，this field records the FI document number of the bank transaction fee.

entry.title: Re: DOX Premium Prompting: Best Practices & Hints
entry.content: Great Blog! Thank you🚀

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Integration - System Downtime handling by Automatic Deployment and Undeployment of the
entry.content:
Hello Anish,

As seen in the error screenshot, I am not sure where entity "clientId" is coming from. Are you using OAuth authentication ? 

Please check and confirm.

 

Thanks,

Punith

entry.title: Re: Need to find BOM chang history for changes done & Mai...
entry.content:
Activate the change number config and always create the BOM with a new change number. Change number is the key to hold the BOM history. Make sure change number is mandatory for every BOM creation & change.

For automated email you need to activate the workflow functionality with the help of ABAPer using BRF+ table setup where you can maintain the values like email id to whom you can trigger.

Use CS80 to see the complete log & also you can print from there.

entry.title: Re: How do you reverse engineer a JSON or API end-point t...
entry.content: Swagger -> OpenAPI format. Or WSDL or other formats (IDL for Web Services / See https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Interface_description_language)

entry.title: Re: Maximum quantity limit for line items in sales orders
entry.content:
Hi,

To directly address your question, the maximum number of items in a single sales order primarily depends on the digit limitations of the line item number. If the "Item Number Increment" is set to 1, the system can accommodate up to 999,999 items.

However, if you are not utilizing partial delivery or partial billing features, you should also consider the constraints of the Finance module. Specifically, the Finance documents has a primary limit of 999 items of sales billing related, as detailed in SAP Note 2978405.

Best Regards,
Fancy

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Petoberfest 2024
entry.content: This dog is trying to troubleshoot the couch situation. 😀

entry.title: Remove Legal Control block via User Exit
entry.content:
Dear experts,

According to the master data and settings my sales order item is blocked for legal control within new HANA system (S/4 HANA 2022 FPS01😞

Schedule Line 1 (Item 10) is blocked by Legal Control (Intern. Trade)

Message No. /SAPSLL/PLUGINR3039

Diagnosis

You want to create a document with a material, which is subject to legal control regulations and is therefore blocked.

System Response

The system blocked this schedule line in accordance with the settings you have maintained in your international trade configuration.

Procedure

Check or release the block in the 'Analyze and Resolve Blocked Documents - Trade Compliance' app. For more information, please contact your trade compliance specialist.

 

Within old ECC system I had the possibility to exclude some combinations related to receiving country and material classification. This seems not to be possible in HANA without SAP GTS.

Does anyone have experiences to remove the legal control relevance when saving a sales order doc via user exit? I assumed that it will work with USEREXIT_SAVE_DOCUMENT & USEREXIT_SAVE_DOCUMENT_PREPARE  within SAPMV45A when I clear fields YVBAP-TOTAL_LCCST, YVBAK-TOTAL_LCCST and XVBAK-TOTAL_LCCST.

 

Regrettable this is not working.

I would be thankful for any hint or suggestion.

thanks in advance.

Best regards

 

Patrick

entry.title: Re: Unlock the Power of SAP Build and More During Devtoberfest Week 1
entry.content:
Come to the sessions, and then complete the session questions to get points for Devtoberfest!!

P.S.: And make sure to do the SAP Crossword Puzzle -- if you think you're smart enough about about SAP!!

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/devtoberfest2024-sap-crossword.html

entry.title: Issue with : Perform Maintenance Jobs without assignment functionality
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

While exploring one of client requirement: As ' Supervisor can confirm the work without assigning WO/Operations to his name',

I can came across below node and did configuration accordingly. ( shown in fig 2)

 

 

Expectation from system behaviour is : System to allow [Perform Maintenance Jobs app] supervisor to confirm the Job/operations without assigning to his name or allow to confirm the Job even it is assigned to other technician(s)

Observation is, System is not behaving as mentioned above ? Am I missing something here ? 

Any comments or suggestion or alternative solution to client requirement ?

BR,

Riyaj

entry.title: Re: Hi I need sample fs document for sap mm buniness scne...
entry.content:
Hello @Dharmavarapu_Hema 

There is no Sample FS document which SAP provides as such. Please create your own or check with customer. For standard scope refer to SAP best practices in the SAP Process Navigator.

Thanks and Regards,

Vijayendra

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2024 - Tooling (SAP Build) Sessions
entry.content: Quick and Easy reference to all the Tooling Tuesday sessions and highlights of Devtoberfest 2024!  Good one!

entry.title: Re: Linear Data Tab in Functional Location (Linear Asset Management)
entry.content:
You need to create a new FLOC category called 'L' and also you need to activate the below Business Functions (SFW5)

  • LOG_EAM_CI_1
  • LOG_EAM_SIMPLICITY
  • LOG_EAM_LINEAR_1

Then only you can see the linear asset options 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Create an Application with SAP Build Apps
entry.content: Good article with simple steps to follow.

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Petoberfest 2024
entry.content: country girl hella!

entry.title: Re: SSR Challenges in SAP Commerce Cloud
entry.content:
@joris_quenee thanks for the interesting article. When you talk about "local SSR caching", which parts of the application do you mean exactly?

Do you have more inputs on how to setup the OCC API caching (local at each node)?

BR Jan

entry.title: Re: Change "Type" Requirement to Project Task
entry.content:
It is not possible to change the type Requirements into  Project Task. But there is a workaround:

  1. Download Excel "For Creation Using Template"
  2. Change the type in the Excel file to “Project Task”
  3. Switch to the Tasks App and upload the Excel file
  4. If anything is ok, delete the requirement

entry.title: Re: RAP action deep result: Field not found in the data c...
entry.content: The data elements of the properties in question are: VBELN_VA, VGBEL, WAERS_CM, VALTG, WAERK, VBELN_GRP and a nested structure.

entry.title: Re: Maximum quantity limit for line items in sales orders
entry.content: hi Fancy, Thanks.

entry.title: Re: 國外供應商的第三方採購
entry.content:
Hello @Haily

Kindly refer to the standard scopes available for the expected scenarios like BD3, BDK, 4R6, BDN etc. refer to the below link.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/a376cd9ea00d476b96f18dea1247e6a5/6f66b65334e6b54ce10000000a174cb4.html 

Best Regards,

Vijayendra

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2024 - Tooling (SAP Build) Sessions
entry.content:
I had a look at the session catalogue and need to tell my boss, that I will not do any work next weeks but just attending to all this valuable stuff.

He will not agree to me imo, so will the sessions be recorded and can I view them afterwards?

entry.title: Re: Tolerance Limits in Availability Control Profile in S...
entry.content:
Hi Daniela,

The "++ All Activity Groups" option is required for any Activity Groups that are not explicitly defined (Needs to be added to your list!). If you explicitly define an Activity Group (e.g., "Purchase Order"), this will override the "++ All Activity Groups" for that specific Activity Group.

Furthermore, the feature to exclude or restrict specific Activity Groups isn't supported (as this question is raised sometimes). You can only apply restrictions by using different nodes in the G/L Account Hierarchy.

To effectively ignore a particular Activity Group, you could set a Warning with a 999% usage. However, this will not fully cover the feature of "exclusion".

Best Regards,

Marcel

entry.title: Re: Maximum quantity limit for line items in sales orders
entry.content:
Hi @omega-ou , 

Correct one info: If the "Item Number Increment" is set to 1, the system can accommodate up to 999,999 items. It is because the digit of item number is 6.

Best Regards,
Fancy

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2024 - Tooling (SAP Build) Sessions
entry.content:
@patrick_weber11  Thanks for kind words 😸

The sessions are done as YouTube livestreams, and you can watch them on replay anytime you want. But try to sneak away to watch 1 or 2 live so you can ask questions to the presenters -- it will be like when you were young and you had to go to bed but you snuck a radio under the covers to listen to the ball game ⚾⚽

entry.title: Re: Gropup reporting on premise 2023/SP1 - enable the hie...
entry.content:
Hello Wissler,

Only reason I can think of is this: WBS element has a superordinate field maintained as project. For this field we have the option to enable hierarchy. From IMG Documentation: Some master data fields have a Superordinate Field, which is used to restrict or separate the data records of a master data field.

If we enable the hierarchy for project then either the rnablement for WBS will be automatically taken care, or may not be required. 

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: New GL distribution functionality (Tcode:FAGLGA35) to distribute cost from one GL account to ano
entry.content: Hi, I have the same requirement. Could you please provide more details about the solution? Thank you.

entry.title: SAP Build App data connection with Odata Integration.
entry.content: I am trying to connect with Table to oData integration in SAP BUILD App. It is connected but data is not showing in table. Please help me into this.

entry.title: Re: Issues creating Hana DB Free tier instance on Azure
entry.content: The (newer) multienvironment SAP HANA Cloud Central shows only SAP HANA instance of one subaccount. The restriction applies to the global account.

entry.title: Application Decisions for HR Talent Management
entry.content:
Summary

This article seeks to provide guidance on deciding the most suitable target application architecture to support Talent Management (incl. processes for Recruiting / Talent Management / Learning / Rewarding) needs of an organization in the Business Domain of Human Resources.

With SAP SuccessFactors and SAP S/4HANA both delivering solution capabilities around Talent Management, enterprises now have multiple applications to choose from and need to make their selection by comparing their organization’s business capability requirements to the solution capabilities SAP applications offer.

Licensing aspects of the solution components discussed should be considered during target architecture design and is beyond the scope of this evaluation.

 

Business Requirements

Typical variety of business capabilities constituting Talent Management (incl. processes for Recruiting / Talent Management / Learning / Rewarding) can be seen in the illustration below:

 

Solution Options

Typical deployment choices for Talent Management are the following:

  • SAP SuccessFactors Talent Management is SAP’s strategic Public Cloud HR solution operated as Software as a Service (SaaS). With the solutions of the Talent Management suite you can adapt quickly to address any skill gaps with powerful software for talent intelligence, recruiting, onboarding, performance, compensation, learning, succession, and development.
  • HCM Talent Management SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud or RISE is the successor of HCM in SAP ERP 6 with all advantages of a private cloud environment and the flexibility and extensibility known from the classical HCM solution. It can either be run in an integrated ERP scenario together with Finance and Logistics or separated in a stand-alone HCM scenario. Important: As per SAP Note 3091160 SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud or RISE does NOT support Talent Management (incl. processes for Recruiting / Talent Management / Learning / Rewarding) in the standard editions and SAP strongly encourages using SAP SuccessFactors for this scope instead. In certain cases it is possible to include Talent Management modules in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition, Tailored Option. Overall, it has to be considered that there had been changes in the availability of certain modules and processes with HCM for S/4HANA (H4S4). Please see again SAP Note 3091160 for details.
  • Further option is to keep the existing SAP ERP 6 (not lower than Enhancement Pack 6) until 2027 (with mainstream maintenance) or 2030 (with extended maintenance option at additional cost), then migrate to SAP S/4HANA Release 2023 or higher and activate the business function for HCM for S/4HANA (H4S4). Please see SAP Note 3091160 for further details.

 

Criteria to determine the most suitable target solution

The following questions are seen to be crucial to determine the most suitable target solution and to define the course:

  1. Do you want to keep your existing HCM solution by SAP for longer?
  2. Do you have any policies or regulations preventing you from using a public cloud solution?
  3. Do you require fast innovation?
  4. Do you require a high degree of process customization?
  5. Do you need to separate your HCM from the transactional ERP?

Decision Tree

 

Conclusion

  • SAP SuccessFactors solutions are proven to be the best choice in case you need to adopt SAP HCM innovation at maximum speed. If SAP RISE is used for core operations, SuccessFactors is the first choice to cover the Talent Management processes as they are not included in the standard edition of RISE and can only be included in certain cases in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition, Tailored Option.
  • Deployment choice SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Edition offers the highest degree of flexibility with highly complex and customized process flows. In addition, it is the alternative for Public Cloud solutions, if there are regulations or policies in your organization preventing to store employee data in public cloud solutions.
  • Depending on corporate policies and business requirements SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud or RISE can either co-host HCM functionality in the integrated S/4HANA scenario or a standalone HCM instance, as required.
  • ERP version 6 is guaranteed to be under extended maintenance for HCM solutions through 2030 after which you must migrate to one of the options listed above. Most commonly, transition from ERP HCM to HCM for S/4HANA is being conducted by a system conversion (known as “Brownfield” transition approach)

Look out to similar decision accelerators in other HR scenarios (e.g., Payroll, Time Management etc.) in the adjacent articles in this community.

Should you need subject matter expertise from SAP with regards to this or other architecture decisions, please feel free to ask your Technical Quality Manager or your Account Executive at SAP.

entry.title: APM - Indicator monitoring not showing all values
entry.content:
Hello,

I am currently researching how APM-Asset health works and how it's possible to write IoT values to SAP via APIs. This works without any issues, but I’ve encountered the following problem.

In the 'Explore technical objects', there is the possibility to monitor the indicator values over time using the 'Indicator monitoring'. However, I noticed that when I write values via the API (or even manually add a value in SAP), it can take a long time before this data is displayed on the graph (or in some cases, certain batches aren't displayed at all). The values are being received correctly, as the latest indicator value is accurate, but there is a significant delay, or in some cases, they don’t appear at all in the indicator monitoring.

Has anyone else experienced this, or knows a solution? Has it something to do with the integration?

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: Table for Charge Type of TM
entry.content:
Hello @RogerMou 

  • Table /SCMTMS/C_TCET - charge types
  • Table /SCMTMS/C_TCETT - charge type descriptions

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Error while generating E-Invoice
entry.content: You have already found the reason yourself. First the invoice was created and then the address ID was changed in the business partner master data. This change does not affect invoices that were already created at this time. When master data is changed, no documents are automatically changed. Address ID in the open invoices must be changed manually. That is why the old address ID remained in the invoice.

entry.title: Re: 🟢 Clean Core Extensibility with ABAP Cloud in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition
entry.content: Please share ppt here

entry.title: Re: SSR Challenges in SAP Commerce Cloud
entry.content:
@JanWidmer 

OCC Caching (local at each node) : https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_COMMERCE_CLOUD_PUBLIC_CLOUD/3476714bba0b4cb9b3eb58c270e44439/8b711228866910149500b73575cb386e.html?locale=en-US

SSR Caching / server.ts : https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_COMMERCE_COMPOSABLE_STOREFRONT/eaef8c61b6d9477daf75bff9ac1b7eb4/c48860c28fbf443d906c682a2aed23b2.html?locale=en-US&version=6.8&q=ssr+caching#cache

 And you can also implement custom cache for some common parts.

entry.title: Re: Sales Document Approval Workflow
entry.content:
Hello Brinda,

your sales order has probably been send to a different approver. Have you checked the "Flexible Workflow Administration" app to see the status and assigned approver of your sales order workflow?

 

Best regards,

Marvin

entry.title: Re: Sales Document Approval Workflow

Hello Brinda,

your workflow has probably found a different approver. Have you checked the "Flexibel Workflow Administration" app to see the status and approver of the sales order workflow?

Best regards,

Marvin

entry.title: SAP Cloud Foundry - IP ranges of NAT gateways
entry.content:
In reference to question Solved: SAP Kyma - IP ranges of NAT gateways - is there a similar option to get the stable IP address for Cloud Foundry environments?

We have a similar situation, where a supplier with an SFTP server doesn't want to whitelist the whole bunch of AWS egress IPs of our Cloud Foundry region. 

Regions and API Endpoints Available for the Cloud Foundry Environment | SAP Help Portal

SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry runtime and environment

entry.title: Re: Invoice by ship-to
entry.content:
An email always goes to the email address of the contact person. You must therefore select the correct contact person that belongs to the delivery address.

You can do this with a formatted search in the contact person field in the invoice, which is always executed when the delivery address is changed.

In the business partner master data, you can assign a contact person to an address and then check this assignment in the query for the formatted search.

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2024 Week 1 Contest Activities
entry.content: @mwn - it links to a tutorial.  We want to have a variety of tutorials that match with the topics covered.  This one is older but also fundamental information that will help beginners.

entry.title: Re: WBS Element not appearing in Sales Order Line Item
entry.content: Excellent! I have find the exact reason why TAO item category not allowed WBS account entry in SO line.

entry.title: Re: Table for Charge Type of TM
entry.content: Got it, thank you~~

entry.title: Re: “I now have SAP S/4HANA Embedded Analytics. Do I still need a data warehouse?”
entry.content:
Hello @FreekKeijzer 

thanks for your response.

Unfortunately I have no real life experience ... since either eBW has been used only for Data preparation, or live reading to import this data into SAC ... or there are only a few Controlling department users, who consume the BI standard content in S4 with which also only S4 data is read.... but the Queries require the embedded BW.

Nevertheless I know several small companies, who ask for eBW as a successor of the stand-alone BW. They prefer to reduce their data volumes, to save additional license fees and utilize the eBW and Live SAC access over moving to SAP Datasphere... the monthly costs do not really compensate the benefits of their currently rather small reporting landscape ... e.g. only SD/MM reporting.

BR, Martin

entry.title: How to configure. SAP BTP Destination to generate Successfactors LMS OAuth token?
entry.content:
I am working on a small POC to make a simple OData API call through BTP application.  The call to the OData API works fine if i send the below mentioned details programmatically.

{

    "grant_type": "client_credentials",

    "scope": {

        "userId": "",

        "companyId": "",

        "userType": "",

        "resourceType": "learning_public_api"

    },

    "client_id": "",

    "client_secret": ""

}

But when i try to use the destination in the SAP BTP it fails.  

Can anyone help me in this issue.

thanks

Suchendra Kumar

Please guide me to generate LOP through Time Evaluation PT60.

Thanks in advance,
Sakthi.G
